messages.text: You draw the marrow reaver across {target} and its living edge weeps rot into the wound as it opens. Your strike {verb} them!
{source} draws a marrow reaver across you and the wound it leaves festers and burns at once. The blows {verb} you!
{source} draws a marrow reaver across {target}, and the pale blade weeps a bead of rot down its edge.
You sweep the marrow reaver at {target} and its rot-slick edge hisses through empty air.
{source} sweeps a marrow reaver at you and the pale blade passes by.
{source} sweeps a marrow reaver at {target} and misses.
You bury the marrow reaver in {target} and the blade drinks deep, flooding the wound with the Bloom's poison! Your strike {verb} them!
{source} buries a marrow reaver in you and the Bloom's poison floods through the wound! The blows {verb} you!
{source} buries a marrow reaver in {target} and the pale blade weeps rot into the wound!
